description: Court record, probably a bill of release between a woman named Turfa and a man named Sayyid al-Kull. Signed by [...] b. Elʿazar ha-Kohen and Natan b. Ulla. Probably written by Mevorakh b. Natan. On verso, pen trials with biblical verses.
description_he: מסמך משפטי. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
